templates.name: Bridal discount request / Wedding party
templates.content: We offer a 15% discount and complimentary expedited shipping on Bridal orders. Please fill out our Bridal Concierge Form so that we can help you with your bridal order: https://lakepajamas.attn.tv/akKtT14Y5mks

templates.name: Why has the price changed?
templates.content: Thank you for the question. These query is best handled by our client services team and you can reach out to them via email at info@lakepajamas.com. They will be happy to help out!

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://lakepajamas.com/pages/size-guide

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at info@lakepajamas.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: When will be exchange order ship?
templates.content: As soon as your return is scanned by USPS, your exchange order will be placed.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size. We typically recommend sizing up if you feel you're between sizes. You can also check out our size guide here: https://lakepajamas.com/pages/size-guide

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@lakepajamas.com or give us a call at (912) 999-6177. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://lakepajamas.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Restock
templates.content: For an estimated restock date please email us directly at info@lakepajamas.com. Our team is happy to help out!

templates.name: Product care recommendations for Lake Pajamas
templates.content: We recommend you machine wash with like colors on the delicate cycle in cold water. Don't use bleach or OxyClean, and lay flat to dry. Your pajamas should be treated as delicate and shouldn't be washed with heavy items such as jeans and towels. Washing as directed will extend the life of your garment.

templates.name: Will my Pima Pajamas shrink?
templates.content: Yes, as with all 100% cotton clothing, you can expect shrinking. Machine drying will increase the degree of shrinking and isn't recommended. Your pajamas should have a relaxed, comfortable fit when new. We typically recommend sizing up if you feel you're between sizes.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (912) 999-6177 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: How do I check my E-gift card or store credit balance?
templates.content: Hope this helps! You can check your balance here - https://lakepajamas.com/pages/check-gift-card-balance

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/lakepajamas/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/lakepajamas

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://lakepajamas.com/pages/stores

templates.name: Where are the products made?
templates.content: Our Pima pajamas are made in Peru.

templates.name: International shipping
templates.content: We offer international shipping to Canada, Australia, Bahamas, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Singapore, Spain, Switzerland, UAE, and UK. International orders are shipped on a delivery duty paid basis therefore international shipping costs, duties, and taxes are calculated at checkout and charged when the order is placed. Shipping costs, duties, and taxes are non-refundable, and we don't provide return labels for international orders at this time. We can't ship gift boxes internationally.

templates.name: Can I add a gift note/message?
templates.content: Please follow the instructions during checkout to include a gift message on the packing slip. We don't offer a gift receipt option, but we don't include pricing information in any shipments so the gift recipient won't see those details.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: We don't offer wholesale ordering at this time.

templates.name: Holiday Shipping
templates.content:
You can still get your gifts by the 24th when you order by:

-Midnight EST of December 18 for Standard Shipping
-Noon EST of December 20 for 2-day shipping
-Noon EST of December 21 for Overnight Shipping

Hope it helps.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via UPS or USPS and once shipped, it will take 1-7 business days domestically. We also offer expedited shipping, if you need it faster.

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments after the sale period has ended?
templates.content: Thanks for contacting LAKE. I completely understand wanting to take advantage of a great offer, but unfortunately, our sale period has ended. We can't extend discounts outside of the sale timeframe. As a subscriber, you'll be the first to know about future promotions and launches. Let me know if I can assist you with anything else!

templates.name: When/How often do you have sales?
templates.content: Thanks for contacting LAKE! We have three sales per year: our Annual Sale, Summer Sale, and Black Friday. As a subscriber, you'll be the first to know about any upcoming sales and new launches! Let us know if you need any help finding something in the meantime! 💙

templates.name: Where are your products shipped/sent from?
templates.content: Our products are distributed from Virginia.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free standard shipping on all US orders over $75. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Do you provide gift receipt?
templates.content: We do not offer a gift receipt option, but we do not include any pricing information in any shipments, so the gift recipient will not see those details.
